---
# ============================================================
# PROJECTS PAGE (proj.qmd)
# Showcases your work with embedded PDF previews so visitors
# can read your reports directly on the page.
# ============================================================

title: "Projects"   # ✏️ Shown in the browser tab and page header
---

<!-- ============================================================
  OPTIONAL: Short intro sentence at the top of the page.
  ✏️ Replace or delete this.
  Example: "Here's a selection of projects from my coursework and personal work."
============================================================ -->

✏️ A brief intro about your projects goes here.

---

<!-- ============================================================
  PROJECT 1
  ✏️ Fill in every placeholder marked with ✏️
  Copy this entire block (up to the next ---) to add more projects.
============================================================ -->

## ✏️ Project Title

**Course:** ✏️ COMP 101 — Introduction to Programming  
**Date:** ✏️ Fall 2024  
**Tags:** ✏️ `Python` `Data Analysis` `Visualization`
<!-- Tags: just type whatever labels apply, wrapped in backticks like above -->

✏️ Write 2–3 sentences describing what this project is about, what problem
it solves, and what tools or methods you used. Keep it approachable —
imagine explaining it to someone outside your major.

<!-- PDF PREVIEW
  - Replace "example_report.pdf" with your actual filename
  - Make sure the PDF is saved in the same folder as this .qmd file
  - width="100%" makes it stretch to fill the page column
  - height="600px" controls how tall the preview box is — increase for longer docs
  - The <p> fallback text shows only if the browser can't render the PDF inline
    (uncommon, but good to have)
-->
<iframe src="example_report.pdf"
        width="100%"
        height="600px"
        style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;">
  <p>Your browser can't preview PDFs.
     <a href="✏️ example_report.pdf">Click here to download instead.</a>
  </p>
</iframe>

<!-- OPTIONAL: direct download link below the preview -->
[⬇ Download PDF](✏️ example_report.pdf)

---

<!-- ============================================================
  PROJECT 2
  ✏️ Same structure as above — fill in your details
============================================================ -->

## ✏️ Project Title

**Course:** ✏️ STOR 155 — Introduction to Statistics  
**Date:** ✏️ Spring 2025  
**Tags:** ✏️ `R` `Statistics` `ggplot2`

✏️ Description of your second project goes here.

<iframe src="example_report2.pdf"
        width="100%"
        height="600px"
        style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;">
  <p>Your browser can't preview PDFs.
     <a href="✏️ example_report2.pdf">Click here to download instead.</a>
  </p>
</iframe>

[⬇ Download PDF](✏️ example_report2.pdf)

---

<!-- ============================================================
  PROJECT 3
  ✏️ Same structure — delete this block entirely if you only have 2 projects
============================================================ -->

## ✏️ Project Title

**Course:** ✏️ BIOL 201 — Cell Biology  
**Date:** ✏️ Fall 2025  
**Tags:** ✏️ `Research` `Lab Report` `Data Collection`

✏️ Description of your third project goes here.

<iframe src="example_report3.pdf"
        width="100%"
        height="600px"
        style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 4px;">
  <p>Your browser can't preview PDFs.
     <a href="✏️ example_report3.pdf">Click here to download instead.</a>
  </p>
</iframe>

[⬇ Download PDF](✏️ example_report3.pdf)

<!-- ============================================================
  ADDING MORE PROJECTS LATER
  To add a new project, copy everything between two --- dividers
  and paste it at the bottom. Update all the ✏️ placeholders.
============================================================ -->
